members.name: Charizard
members.notes: Tu starter. Slash tiene alto critical en Gen 1. Flamethrower a nv 46.

members.name: Nidoking
members.notes: Nidoran♂ en Route 3. Coverage brutal con TMs. Earthquake late game.

members.name: Vaporeon
members.notes: Eevee en Celadon → Water Stone. Tu Water type principal. Gran bulk.

members.name: Snorlax
members.notes: Route 12/16. Tanque Normal con stats brutales.

members.name: Exeggutor
members.notes: Safari Zone. NO evolucionar antes de Sleep Powder (nv 37).

members.name: Jynx
members.notes: Canje en Cerulean (dar Poliwhirl). Ice/Psychic para Lance. Lovely Kiss sleep 75%.
